message:
refactor: convert 609 fmt.Sprintf+slog calls to structured fields (#4505)

Replace all slog.Info/Warn/Error(fmt.Sprintf(...)) with native slog
key-value structured fields across 62 files. This enables proper
machine-readable log output for aggregation tools (ELK, Datadog,
Grafana Loki) and removes unnecessary string formatting overhead.

Example:
  Before: slog.Error(fmt.Sprintf("[K8s] cluster %s failed: %v", name, err))
  After:  slog.Error("[K8s] cluster failed", "cluster", name, "error", err)

Removed unused fmt imports from 18 files where fmt was only used for
slog formatting. No logic changes.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
